test.command: uv run pytest -q && cargo test --features cuda

lint.command: uv run ruff check . && cargo clippy --features cuda

appliedUpdates.description: Documented TG_TEST_CUDA_BEHAVIOR test hooks and cudarc Windows DLL loading quirks in gpu-native-engine.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance for workers on thread-safe environment variable modifications, explicitly discouraging the use of `env::set_var` at runtime due to thread safety issues (UB risk).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In cudarc-foundation, the worker used `env::set_var` to modify PATH at runtime to ensure cudarc could find the DLLs. This is an unsafe practice.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Provide guidance that pre-search synchronous file tree traversals (e.g. for counting bytes to determine auto-routing thresholds) can introduce latency on very large codebases, violating the goal to reduce control-plane overhead. Suggest lazy or background evaluation for routing metrics when possible.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In gpu-auto-routing-and-fallback, the worker added a synchronous WalkBuilder iteration over all files before starting the search just to check if the total size exceeds the 50MB threshold.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add the Windows fallback directly to the base startup procedure instead of just inside the backend-worker skill notes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In gpu-scale-benchmarks, the worker initially attempted to execute `.factory/init.sh` which fails natively on Windows, before discovering the fallback.
